content.scenarioHint: 你正在跟进一个重要的项目进度邮件，想礼貌询问同事是否已发送，对方是你的团队成员，你们平时关系良好但保持专业。
content.speakerText: Hi, just wanted to check if the project update email has been sent out yet?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，想确认一下项目更新邮件发出去了吗？
expectedAnswers: I just sent it a few minutes ago—should be in your inbox.
Not yet, I'm waiting for the finance team to confirm the numbers.
I'll send it by the end of the hour, I promise.
Actually, I forgot—thanks for reminding me, I'll send it right away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰礼貌地询问了邮件发送状态
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当（如现在完成时、将来时）
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气得体不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'project update', 'sent', 'email' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Hi, just wanted to follow up—has the weekly status email been sent to the team?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，想跟进一下，周报邮件发给团队了吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, it was sent at 9 a.m. with all the KPIs included.
I'm just finishing it now—I'll send it within the hour.
Not yet, but I've drafted it and will send it after the manager's approval.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了邮件发送状态及后续计划
语言准确性：使用了恰当的时态（现在完成时、将来时）和专业词汇
表达自然度：语气礼貌、结构完整，符合职场跟进语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'follow up', 'weekly status email', 'sent', 'team' 等核心词汇
